name: Quartz
description: Amethyst crystals growing from the cave floor — prisms stretch, lean and glint differently under every seed.

code.style: --gem1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --gem2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --q1: @rand(36%, 92%); --q2: @rand(24%, 64%); --qt1: @rand(-10deg, 4deg); --qt2: @rand(-4deg, 10deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 24%; bottom: 0; width: 24%; height: var(--q1); background: var(--gem1); clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 20%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 20%); opacity: 0.88; transform: rotate(var(--qt1)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 52%; bottom: 0; width: 24%; height: var(--q2); background: var(--gem2); clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 20%, 100% 100%, 0% 100%, 0% 20%); opacity: 0.72; transform: rotate(var(--qt2)); transform-origin: 50% 100%; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
